channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FDA Commissioner Dr. Marty Makary Resigns
item.description: Dr. Makary's departure follows a challenging period, exceeding the tenure of some prior commissioners.

item.title: Report: Trump's missile defense system cost estimate significantly lower
item.description: A Congressional Budget Office report analyzes a potential approach, indicating costs far exceeding the President's stated figure.

item.title: U.S. auto industry faces $3.3 trillion trade deficit
item.description: A significant trade deficit raises concerns for both the automotive sector and national security.

item.title: India Reinstates Work-From-Home Rules, Asks for Fertilizer Use Reduction
item.description: India faces economic challenges due to potential disruptions in its oil supply from Iran.
